text: Buyer reports that Klarna was advertised on the listing but was unavailable at checkout.
Buyer asks whether the seller will ship before all Pay in 4 installments are completed.
Customer wants to know why an order containing mixed delivery methods is not eligible for Klarna.
Buyer requests confirmation that a returned order will stop future scheduled payments.
Customer asks where to see the financing interest rate and full repayment amount before accepting.
Seller asks whether a buyer default can affect the seller payout after the order has shipped.
Buyer was declined by Klarna and wants to know whether eBay can explain the decision.
Customer says the Klarna payment schedule is easy to manage and asks whether the option can be saved as a preference.
